subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down by the Wronged One unto them that have believed in God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, that the potency of My verses may draw them unto My Kingdom and strengthen them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم لیجتذبه جذب ایاتی الی ملکوتی و یؤیده علی
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
